spec.name: MissingSecurityHeadersValidator
spec.description: Checks for missing security headers on HTTP endpoints.

spec.name: CryptoValidator
spec.description: Checks for weak TLS versions and sensitive data transmitted over plaintext HTTP.

spec.title: Unauthenticated Redis Access
spec.description: Redis exposed on 6379 and accepting unauthenticated connections.

spec.title: Missing Security Headers
spec.description: HTTP response missing baseline defensive headers.

result.impact: Missing headers can increase exposure to clickjacking and some XSS scenarios.
result.remediation: Add standard security headers (at minimum CSP and X-Frame-Options) at the web server or application layer.

evidence.matched: strict-transport-security (HSTS - enforces HTTPS), x-content-type-options (prevents MIME sniffing), x-frame-options (prevents clickjacking)

result.impact: Missing 6 security headers: strict-transport-security (HSTS - enforces HTTPS), x-content-type-options (prevents MIME sniffing), x-frame-options (prevents clickjacking). This reduces defense against various attacks.
result.remediation: Add HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP, and other security headers to all responses.

artifacts.value: strict-transport-security (HSTS - enforces HTTPS), x-content-type-options (prevents MIME sniffing), x-frame-options (prevents clickjacking)

{'missing_headers': ['strict-transport-security (HSTS - enforces HTTPS)', 'x-content-type-options (prevents MIME sniffing)', 'x-frame-options (prevents clickjacking)', 'x-xss-protection (legacy XSS protection)', 'content-security-policy (controls resource loading)', 'referrer-policy (controls referrer information)']}

evidence.matched: strict-transport-security (HSTS - enforces HTTPS), x-content-type-options (prevents MIME sniffing), x-frame-options (prevents clickjacking)
